class.name: BTConditionAS_HasTag
class.brief_description: BTCondition that checks if the agent has a specific Ability System tag.
class.description: A Behavior Tree condition that checks if the actor's [ASComponent] has a specific tag. Returns [constant BT.SUCCESS] if tag present, [constant BT.FAILURE] otherwise. Supports hierarchical matching (e.g., checking [code]State[/code] matches [code]State.Stunned[/code]).

method.name: get_exact_match
method.description: Returns whether to use exact tag matching.

method.name: get_tag
method.description: Returns the tag to check for.

method.name: set_exact_match
method.description: If [code]true[/code], requires exact tag match. If [code]false[/code], allows hierarchical matching.

method.name: set_tag
method.description: Sets the tag to check for.
